name: Claude Code — Headless Run
description: Spawn a headless Claude Code subprocess with MoJo injected as its MCP server. The spawned agent can call back via external_agent(ask_user) for HITL. Returns the task_id and pid. Use scheduler(action='get', task_id=...) to monitor. Requires the claude CLI on PATH or CLAUDE_BIN env var.

MOJO_BASE_URL.description: MoJo MCP HTTP base URL (use http://localhost:8000 for local)

prompt.description: The task description for Claude Code

working_dir.description: Absolute path to the working directory (default: $HOME)

task_id.description: Pre-assign a task_id for tracking (optional, auto-generated if omitted)
